程序包 bupt.ta.llm

  • 类概要 
    类 说明
    DeepSeekClient
    DeepSeek Chat API (OpenAI-compatible: POST /v1/chat/completions).
    LlmApplicantSummaryService
    Builds short MO-facing screening summaries for one application.
    LlmMatchInsightService
    Optional DeepSeek-generated narrative on top of rule-based AIMatchService.MatchResult.
    LlmProfileExtractionService
    Calls DeepSeek to extract structured profile fields from CV plain text.
    SseEmitter
    Thin Server-Sent Events helper used by the streaming LLM endpoints.
